message:
DCE: Convert method_calls.zig and core.zig to StaticStringMap

- method_calls.zig: SpecialMethods + QueueMethods maps (8→0 comparisons)
- core.zig: generic_type_map + simple_type_map (7→1 comparisons)
- lambda.zig: No changes needed (single-value comparisons already optimal)
